creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you for submitting a new port.

Since the latest released version is 1.3.0 + some commits, could you update DISTVERSION to 1.3.0.g<commitdate>

Also, please confirm this port passes QA (portlint, poudriere at least)

^Triage: CC MAINTAINER's of x11-toolkits/p5-Wx-GLCanvas & x11-toolkits/p5-Wx (ports resurrected)
